ServiceFAQ.infoBoxBody: Have questions or want to explore possibilities? Feel free to reach out on LinkedIn or book a call.

defaults.q: How fast can you deliver a project?
defaults.a: Depending on complexity, MVPs can be delivered in 2–4 weeks, full products in 6–12 weeks. We commit to clear timelines upfront.

defaults.q: What happens if deadlines aren't met?
defaults.a: We guarantee our delivery commitments. If we miss a deadline, we work overtime at no extra cost until it's done.
Absolutely — we've worked with early-stage startups through to enterprise teams. We adapt our process to your stage and budget.

defaults.q: Do you offer support after launch?
defaults.a: Yes. We offer ongoing maintenance, monitoring, and growth packages so your product keeps improving after launch.

ServiceEstimateCTA.body: Apply for a complimentary discovery workshop and receive a detailed <gold>project proposal</gold> with <gold>timeline</gold> and <gold>cost breakdown</gold>. Limited availability — Apply today!

CTABand.heading: Ready to discuss your project with us?
CTABand.subtitle: Let's build a product experience that not only looks great, but drives real results.

StatsBar.subtitle: From idea to product with speed, clarity and scalable foundations

HomeFAQ.description: Have questions or want to explore possibilities? Feel free to reach out or book a call.

faqs.q: How fast can you deliver a project?
faqs.a: Depending on the scope, we can deliver an MVP in as little as 3–14 days. For larger projects, we work in tight 2-week sprints and keep you updated every step of the way with clear milestones.

faqs.q: What happens if deadlines aren't met?
faqs.a: We take delivery commitments seriously. If a deadline is at risk, we flag it early and work overtime at no extra cost to meet it. Transparent communication is core to how we operate.
Absolutely — startups are our sweet spot. We understand the pace and constraints of early-stage companies and can adapt to your runway, whether that means a lean MVP or a full product build.

faqs.q: Do you offer support after launch?
faqs.a: Yes. All of our engagements include 6 months of post-launch support. We're here to fix bugs, monitor performance, and iterate with you as your product grows.

0.title: Project Type
0.description: What type of project do you need?

landing.name: Landing Page
landing.description: Single page website perfect for product launches, events, or simple business presence

website.name: Multi-page Website
website.description: 3-10 pages with navigation, perfect for businesses needing multiple content sections

webapp.name: Web Application
webapp.description: Interactive web app with user accounts, dashboards, and business logic

mobile.name: Mobile App
mobile.description: Native or cross-platform mobile app for iOS and Android

fullstack.name: Full-stack Platform
fullstack.description: Complete platform with web, mobile, admin panel, and backend infrastructure

1.title: Core Features
1.description: Select the features you need (select all that apply)

auth.name: User Authentication
auth.description: Secure login/signup system with email verification, password reset, and session management

payment.name: Payment Integration
payment.description: Stripe, PayPal, or other payment gateway integration with checkout flow

admin.name: Admin Dashboard
admin.description: Backend admin panel for managing users, content, and system settings

api.name: REST API
api.description: RESTful API for mobile apps or third-party integrations

realtime.name: Real-time Features
realtime.description: Live updates, chat, notifications using WebSockets or Firebase

notifications.name: Push Notifications
notifications.description: Email and/or mobile push notifications for user engagement

crm.name: CRM Integration
crm.description: Connect to Salesforce, HubSpot, or other CRM for lead management

analytics.name: Analytics (GA, Mixpanel)
analytics.description: User behavior tracking and analytics dashboard integration

email.name: Email Service (SendGrid, Mailgun)
email.description: Automated email sending for transactional and marketing emails

storage.name: Cloud Storage (AWS S3)
storage.description: File upload and storage for user documents, images, or videos

social.name: Social Media Login
social.description: Login with Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, or other social providers

basic.name: Basic UI (Template-based)
basic.description: Clean, professional design using pre-built components and templates

custom.name: Custom Design
custom.description: Unique design tailored to your brand with custom components

premium.name: Premium Design with Animations
premium.description: High-end design with micro-interactions, animations, and advanced UX

4.title: Timeline
4.description: When do you need it delivered?

rush.name: Rush (1-2 weeks) +30%
rush.description: Express delivery with priority development and extended team hours

standard.name: Standard (3-4 weeks)
standard.description: Standard timeline with balanced development pace and quality assurance

flexible.name: Flexible (5+ weeks) -15%
flexible.description: Budget-friendly option with flexible delivery schedule
